question: Which country has least number of students?
sql: SELECT country FROM City JOIN Student ON City.city_code = Student.city_code GROUP BY country ORDER BY COUNT(Student.StuID) ASC LIMIT 1;

back_translation.intent: 查找拥有最少学生的国家

semantic.reason: 语义完全一致。SQL正确统计每个国家的学生数量（通过COUNT(Student.StuID)），按数量升序排序后取最小值，符合原始问题'Which country has least number of students?'的意图。
